name: YinHua SZSE100 Index Graded Fund
summary: YinHua SZSE100 Index Graded Fund is an index fund that tracks the performance of the SZSE100 Index, a stock market index of 100 large companies in the Shenzhen Stock Exchange, and is structured as a graded fund. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the performance of leading companies in the Shenzhen stock market. It is managed by Yinhua Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
